name: Big Adventure: Trip to Europe 3 - Collector's Edition
short_description: Travel across Europe in this hidden object adventure! Explore beautiful old towns, find hundreds of hidden items, play new mini-games, and enjoy the cozy atmosphere of European landmarks and culture.
detailed_description:
The continuation of the beloved series takes you on a new journey across Europe — more countries, more mysteries, and brand-new mini-games. You’ll explore ancient cities, cozy streets, and dozens of hidden objects scattered among stunning European landscapes.

Visit the Bullring in Seville, stroll through the vineyards of La Rioja, see the ancient San Sebastian lighthouse, enjoy the theme park in Senlis, France, and take a walk along the canals of Venice. Along the way, you’ll explore national parks, visit a luxurious casino in Monaco, step into two fascinating museums and an ancient castle, and discover more about Europe’s rich musical culture.

✨ Game Features:
• Over 15 beautiful hidden-object locations
• Find more than 500 hidden items and a cute raccoon on every level
• Over 15 unique new mini-games
• Beautiful desktop wallpapers
• A collectible album with virtual postage stamps

This new chapter keeps the warm atmosphere of previous games while adding even more details, puzzles, and visual surprises. It’s a calm and cozy journey where every level feels like a postcard from Europe — full of charm and little treasures waiting to be found.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian
*languages with full audio support
